prerequisites.value: Improved Unarmed Strike, Gorgon’s Fist, Scorpion Style, base attack bonus +11.

description.value: **Benefit:** Whenever you use the full-attack action and make at least one unarmed strike, you can make two additional unarmed strikes at your highest base attack bonus. These bonus attacks must be made against a dazed, flat-footed, paralyzed, staggered, stunned, or unconscious foe.
